name: us500_vwap_pullback_trend_m5
hypothesis: US500 M5 trends during the US cash session (13:30-20:00 UTC) revert to a rising/falling EMA20 within a broader EMA50>EMA200 alignment; entries on pullbacks to EMA20 with RSI not-yet-exhausted capture continuation legs.

entry_rules.long: EMA50>EMA200 AND ADX>18 AND price pulls back to within 0.25*ATR of EMA20 from above AND RSI(14) between 40 and 65 AND current bar closes bullish; session active.
entry_rules.short: EMA50<EMA200 AND ADX>18 AND price pulls back to within 0.25*ATR of EMA20 from below AND RSI(14) between 35 and 60 AND current bar closes bearish.

exit_rules.stop_loss: 1.5 * ATR(14) from entry, placed beyond most recent swing
exit_rules.take_profit: scale 50% at 1.5R; runner targets 3.5R or prior session extreme
exit_rules.trailing: after 1R, trail by EMA20 cross on close
exit_rules.time_stop: close after 24 M5 bars (2h) if not at least +0.5R; hard-close at 20:15 UTC

falsifiable_conditions: Reject if PF<2.0, Sharpe<1.5, MaxDD>15%, trades<200, or if pullback-entries underperform immediate-breakout entries on same regime (thesis wrong).
notes: Fourth family: trend_pullback, distinct from breakout, mean_reversion, and trend_breakout above.
